What I offer

Focused tuition, real progress

📐

SATs Preparation

Targeted support for Key Stage 2 maths. Building confidence and exam technique for Year 6 students.

📚

Secondary School

Support through KS3 and Years 7–9. Keeping momentum going after SATs and building strong foundations for GCSE.

📊

GCSE Maths

Foundation to Higher tier support. Topic-by-topic progress with past paper practice built in.

📍

London In-Person

Sessions at a convenient location across London. Face-to-face tutoring for students who work best in person.

💻

Online Sessions

Flexible online tuition available nationwide. Same quality, same focus — wherever you are.

About me

Someone in their corner

✓  DBS Checked

I'm Sam, a 27-year-old Maths Tutor based in London. I grew up in Cambridge, where I used to punt on the river Cam as a tour guide, giving tours and telling stories about the University, which I loved. I've recently made the move to London and tutoring has been a big part of settling in.

I've always enjoyed Maths from a young age, in Year 3 my teacher called me a 'Maths Wizard', which I'm still quietly proud of! I want to share that love for the subject with others, and hopefully it rubs off on them too.

I've been tutoring since 2022. I have two younger brothers, so with students it tends to feel more like an older brother relationship than a formal tutor one: calm, patient, and straight-talking.

A number of my students have been with me since their SATs and continued through into secondary school. That consistency has made a real difference.

Because of my working hours, I'm available from 3:30pm on weekdays, meaning your child can get started earlier in the evening rather than waiting until later. This has been very popular with students and parents alike.

Sessions are one-to-one, in person across London or online, built around where your child actually is.
